summary: Checked-in generic literature workflow recipes and protocol authority.

install.claude_code: Consume the checked-in meta/recipes and session-protocol docs from the repo; do not recreate generic workflow authority inside provider-specific MCP facades.
install.codex: Consume the checked-in meta/recipes and session-protocol docs from the repo; use it as workflow authority above atomic MCP tools.
install.opencode: Consume the checked-in meta/recipes and session-protocol docs from the repo; keep workflow authority in the workflow-pack layer.
